'''Carmilla Vandangante''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was a Deputy [[Viceprex/Legends|Viceprex]] of the [[Rigahuerr Publishing Combine]]. She gave birth to her son and only child, [[Klaus Vandangante/Legends|Klaus Vandangante]], on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Carmilla was a widow and a doting mother leading her to raise her son in a luxurious, privileged manner. She would provide Klaus with a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] nanny as well as multiple private tutors. Her household was serviced by house cleaning droids and included a living room with a vase that was used as a stockpile for unwanted foods by a young Klaus. Carmilla also possessed natural qualities conducive to leadership roles, a trait which would later be passed on to her granddaughter [[Jessa Vandangante|Jessa]].<ref name="HSCS"></ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Carmilla Vadangante was first mentioned in [[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook|Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]] by [[Michael Allen Horne|Michael Allen Horne]], a roleplaying guide published by [[West End Games|West End Games]] for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]. Vandangante's first name is the same as the alias used by the vampire in [[Wikipedia:Sheridan le Fanu|Sheridan le Fanu's]] Gothic novel [[Wikipedia:Carmilla|''Carmilla'']].
